creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
Trying to install port games/iourbaterror fails with 

===>  iourbanterror-4.1.1.s2318,1 needs at least one of CLIENT, DEDICATED and SMP options.
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/games/iourbanterror


Where is, please, a description of what has to be done in FreeBSD with this port?

How-To-Repeat: Try installing games/iourbaterror.
